overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in a red robe walking along a dirt path through a rural landscape at night. The character passes stone walls, illuminated lamp posts, a wooden gate, and an abandoned cart while approaching a distant village with stone buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: walled country path with directional lamp post

events.description: character walks past the illuminated directional lamp post with signboards
path narrows between stone walls as the character leaves the starting area

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily along the dirt path away from the lamp post into the walled trail

entered.detail: tall black and white striped lamp post with illuminated lantern and directional signboards
low stone wall running parallel to the left side of the path
low stone wall with grass growing on top along the right side
large rocky hill formation with patches of grass

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with the character standing near an illuminated directional lamp post at night. The character walks forward along a dirt trail, passing the lamp post and entering a narrow path flanked by low stone walls. Rocky hills rise in the background under a dark blue night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: walled path with wooden gate and second lamp

events.description: wooden gate structure attached to the stone wall appears on the right side
character passes a second illuminated lamp post on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: character continues walking along the walled path, passing through a gate area and a second lamp

entered.detail: wooden fence gate with vertical slats attached to the stone wall
illuminated lamp post with wooden base and warm light

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds along the enclosed dirt trail between persistent stone walls. A wooden gate appears on the right and is passed, followed by a second lamp post on the left. The rocky terrain continues to flank the path as the character moves deeper into the countryside.

scene_state.functional_zone: path approaching village with abandoned cart

events.description: wooden cart with large wheels appears stationary on the right side of the path
stone village buildings with lit windows become visible in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: character walks past a wooden cart and continues toward the village visible ahead

entered.detail: wooden wagon with large spoked wheels and covered canopy parked beside the path
cluster of stone cottages with dark roofs and warm light emanating from windows

segments.scene_description: The path opens slightly as the right stone wall ends. The character passes a stationary wooden cart on the right and continues toward a distant village where stone buildings with illuminated windows are visible. The terrain becomes more open with grassy hills and rocky outcrops surrounding the trail.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rural dirt trail at night that transitions from a narrow, enclosed path into an open landscape leading toward a distant village. It begins with the character passing an illuminated directional lamp post before entering a confined corridor flanked by low stone walls under a dark blue sky. As the character proceeds, the scene shifts past a wooden gate and a second lamp post, maintaining the sense of enclosure provided by the persistent stone walls and rocky hills. The path then opens up as the right wall ends, leading the camera past a stationary wooden cart and across more expansive grassy hills. Finally, the terrain broadens further, revealing a cluster of stone buildings with glowing windows in the distance.
